SR_SPLMTL_MH_3_CD 
LABEL: 
Supplemental HRSN Mental Health 3: Feel Tense, Restless, Anxious, Sleepless, Troubled 
DESCRIPTION: Screening result (SR) Supplemental health related social need (HRSN) mental health where patient 
feels tense, restless, nervous or anxious, or unable to sleep at night because mind is troubled all the 
time. 
LONG NAME: SR_SPLMTL_MH_3_CD 
TYPE: 
CHAR
